account.title: Account
account.name: Name
account.nameDescription: This name appears across your account.
account.deleteWarning: This permanently deletes your account and all data (tasks, notes, preferences). This can’t be undone.
account.deleteConfirmText: I understand this cannot be undone.

MembershipPlan.banner: 🎉 Great job! Let Blotz help you get even more done.

taskHandling.title: Task Handling
taskHandling.autoRolloverDescription: Move overdue tasks to today automatically.

language.title: Language
language.infoText: Your language preference will be saved and synced across all your devices.
language.infoTextChinese: 您的语言偏好将被保存并在所有设备上同步。

monthlyReview.title: Monthly Review
monthlyReview.empty: Blotz has a letter ready for you 💌
monthlyReview.emptyHint: Tap the button below to receive it.
monthlyReview.generateError: Couldn't generate this letter. Please try again.
monthlyReview.quotaError: You've hit the usage limit. Please try again later.
monthlyReview.lowActivityHint: Want Blotz to get to know you better? 🌱 Log a few more tasks and your next letter will be way more fun! ✨
monthlyReview.comingSoonTitle: Your first letter is on its way ✨
monthlyReview.comingSoonBody: Monthly reviews arrive after your first full month with Blotz. Keep logging your tasks and we'll have a letter ready for you soon! 🌱
monthlyReview.aiDisclosure: Generated by AI from the tasks you created this month
